Team: # HOW TO USE - Balance Dashboard (MENTOR LEADERBOARD - read only)

# It is 100% FORMULA-DRIVEN and READ-ONLY. Each row just mirrors that team's Financial Statement summary box - paste the references once, then it updates itself.
# Each cell points straight at the matching Statement tab, e.g. row 2 (Team 1):
#   H2 Passive/Expense Ratio = =F2/G2   (the tie-break metric - higher is better)
